Archipelago Version 0.4.5 for Seed: 12345

Player 1: Mario
Game:                            Manual_SMO_archipelago

Player 2: Link
Game:                            A Link to the Past


Locations:

Mario (Manual_SMO_archipelago):
    Cap: Frog-Jumping Above the Fog: Power Moon (Mario)
    Cap: Cap Kingdom Timer Challenge 1: Cascade Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)
    Cascade: Our First Power Moon: Sand Kingdom Power Moon (Link)
    Cascade: Multi Moon Atop the Falls: Cascade Kingdom Multi-Moon (Mario)
    Sand: Atop the Highest Tower: Goomba (Mario)
    Sand: Moon Shards in the Sand: Sand Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)
    Sand: Showdown on the Inverted Pyramid: Sand Kingdom Multi-Moon (Link)
    Lake: Broodals Over the Lake: Lake Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)

Link (A Link to the Past):
    Hyrule Castle - Big Key Chest: Cap Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)
    Eastern Palace - Big Key Chest: Cascade Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)
    Desert Palace - Big Key Chest: Sand Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)
    Tower of Hera - Big Key Chest: Triforce (Link)


Playthrough:

 1: {
    Mario (Manual_SMO_archipelago): Cap: Frog-Jumping Above the Fog -> Power Moon (Mario)
    Mario (Manual_SMO_archipelago): Cap: Cap Kingdom Timer Challenge 1 -> Cascade Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)
    Link (A Link to the Past): Hyrule Castle - Big Key Chest -> Cap Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)
 }
 2: {
    Mario (Manual_SMO_archipelago): Cascade: Our First Power Moon -> Sand Kingdom Power Moon (Link)
    Mario (Manual_SMO_archipelago): Cascade: Multi Moon Atop the Falls -> Cascade Kingdom Multi-Moon (Mario)
    Link (A Link to the Past): Eastern Palace - Big Key Chest -> Cascade Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)
 }
 3: {
    Mario (Manual_SMO_archipelago): Sand: Atop the Highest Tower -> Goomba (Mario)
    Mario (Manual_SMO_archipelago): Sand: Moon Shards in the Sand -> Sand Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)
    Mario (Manual_SMO_archipelago): Sand: Showdown on the Inverted Pyramid -> Sand Kingdom Multi-Moon (Link)
    Link (A Link to the Past): Desert Palace - Big Key Chest -> Sand Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)
 }
 4: {
    Mario (Manual_SMO_archipelago): Lake: Broodals Over the Lake -> Lake Kingdom Power Moon (Mario)
 }


Paths:

Mario:
   Cap: Frog-Jumping Above the Fog: (Cascade Kingdom, "starting")
